Screen.Title: GM Screen
Screen.DeleteTabConfirm: Delete the tab "{name}"? Its layout will be lost. The documents shown on it are not affected.
Screen.DropHint: Drop a character, monster, journal, spell, or item here
Screen.MissingDocumentHint: This document could not be found. It may have been deleted.

Glossary.Title: Glossary
Glossary.DeleteConfirm: Delete the glossary entry "{term}"? Its hover tips will disappear everywhere.
Glossary.Empty: No glossary entries yet. Add a term and hovering it in any journal will show your reminder.
Glossary.AliasesHint: Other names, comma-separated (e.g. 1st Mate Kalindra, the Blacksmith)
Glossary.PlayerTipHint: Optional. Leave empty and players see nothing at all for this term.
Glossary.MirrorIndicator: Players see the same description as the GM
Glossary.LinkHint: Drag a journal entry or actor here for full details
Glossary.LinkTypeWarning: Only journal entries, journal pages, and actors can be linked.
Glossary.LinkMissing: The linked document could not be found — it may have been deleted.
Glossary.DeleteFolderConfirm: Delete the folder "{name}"? Its entries and any subfolders move up to the parent folder; nothing is deleted.
Glossary.ImportResult: Glossary import: {added} added, {updated} updated, {skipped} skipped, {foldersCreated} folders created.
Glossary.ImportError: Could not import the glossary file — check that it is valid JSON.

ButtonLocation.Name: GM Screen Button Location
ButtonLocation.Hint: Where the GM Screen toggle button appears in the interface.

RulesVersion.Name: D&D Rules Version
RulesVersion.Hint: Which rules text the Reference tab displays for conditions and other rules reminders.

GlossaryEnabled.Name: Enable Glossary Hover Tips
GlossaryEnabled.Hint: Turn the glossary feature on or off for yourself. When off, glossary buttons are hidden and hover tips no longer appear. This is a personal choice and does not affect other players.

LoadConditions.Name: Default Status Conditions
LoadConditions.Label: Add Default Status Conditions
LoadConditions.Hint: Adds all standard D&D status conditions to your glossary in a "Rules" folder (player-visible), plus empty "NPCs" and "Places" folders. Existing entries of the same name are updated, never duplicated.
LoadConditions.Confirm: Add the default status conditions and the Rules / NPCs / Places folders to your glossary? Entries with the same name are updated — nothing is duplicated.

LoadDrakkenheim.Name: Drakkenheim Reference
LoadDrakkenheim.Label: Add Drakkenheim Reference
LoadDrakkenheim.Hint: Reads Drakkenheim quick-reference from your installed Drakkenheim modules — the new conditions (added to your glossary) plus travel, exploration, delerium, and Deep Haze notes shown on a dedicated GM Screen tab. This button only appears when a Drakkenheim module is installed; no content ships with GM Tools.
LoadDrakkenheim.Confirm: Add Drakkenheim quick-reference (conditions + a Drakkenheim GM Screen tab) from your installed modules? Existing entries with the same name are updated — nothing is duplicated.
LoadDrakkenheim.Result: Drakkenheim reference added: {conditions} conditions and {sections} reference sections.
LoadDrakkenheim.NotFound: Couldn't find Drakkenheim content. Make sure a Drakkenheim module (and its adventure, for travel/exploration) is installed and enabled.
